name: Redwood National Park (INSPIRED BY FEARS TO FATHOM)
description: 1998, after weeks of trying to find a new job, you found one at a national park as a park ranger who would stay in a fire lookout tower and assist hikers, the place your gonna be living in is gonna be isolated and surrounded by trees and mountains. You thought the job would be easy and worth the money but you soon realize why not many people take the job, you get tasked with occupying tower 5 which most people who sign up dont wanna do as folklore says a beast with humanoid properties and a goat skull like head, you shake it off and say to yourself that its just crazy people making up stuff, unfortunately there was more than rumors waiting for you
creator: Reddeadfanatic
